name: E-Commerce Platform
desc: Full-stack e-commerce website built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Features include user authentication, product management, shopping cart, and payment integration.

name: Task Management App
desc: React-based task management application with drag-and-drop functionality. Built using React, Redux for state management, and Firebase for backend services.

name: Weather Dashboard
desc: Interactive weather dashboard built with JavaScript, HTML, CSS. Uses OpenWeatherMap API to display current weather and forecasts for multiple cities.

name: Portfolio Website
desc: Personal portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features responsive design, smooth animations, and contact form integration.

name: Blog Platform
desc: Full-stack blog platform built with Node.js, Express, and MySQL. Features include user authentication, post creation, commenting system, and admin dashboard.

name: Mobile Chat App
desc: Cross-platform mobile chat application built with React Native and Firebase. Features real-time messaging, user authentication, and push notifications.
